info.name: MindMirror Hackathon Demo
info.description: Seed the three demo users, start one AI session per user, then replay the TruGen webhook callbacks that populate session history and transcript records. Use this against a clean database if possible. For live external callbacks, set your backend APP_NGROK_URL to the public ngrok URL; the collection itself sends direct requests to the API.

body.raw:
{
  "summary": "Chirag walked through presentation anxiety, then settled on a simple 3-breath reset and a one-minute opening script.",
  "mainTopic": "Hackathon presentation confidence",
  "emotionStart": "anxious",
  "emotionEnd": "calm",
  "actionStep": "Practice the opening line aloud three times before the final demo."
}

body.raw:
{
  "summary": "Mauli reworked the presentation flow into three crisp sections and agreed to practice the handoff twice with a timer.",
  "mainTopic": "Presentation structure and pacing",
  "emotionStart": "overloaded",
  "emotionEnd": "focused",
  "actionStep": "Run two timed rehearsals and cut any slide that does not support the final story."
}

      "conversation_id": "c2a7a5f4-3b9b-4c2b-9dd1-8d9a66ef3b52",
      "message_timestamp": 1780944775,
      "name": "",
      "arguments": "",

      "timestamp": "2026-06-10T16:13:06Z",
      "role": "assistant",
      "content": "Keep the answer short: say what the chart shows, why it matters, and what changed because of it.",
      "conversation_id": "c2a7a5f4-3b9b-4c2b-9dd1-8d9a66ef3b52",
      "message_timestamp": 1780944786,
      "name": "",
      "arguments": "",
      "output": "",
      "is_error": false,
      "extra": {},
      "call_id": "",
      "type": "message"
    },
    {
      "timestamp": "2026-06-10T16:13:21Z",
      "role": "user",
      "content": "That is much easier to remember.",
      "conversation_id": "c2a7a5f4-3b9b-4c2b-9dd1-8d9a66ef3b52",
      "message_timestamp": 1780944801,
      "name": "",
      "arguments": "",
      "output": "",

body.raw:
{
  "summary": "Rishi used the session to turn burnout into a short reset plan with a focus block and a hard stop time.",
  "mainTopic": "Hackathon fatigue management",
  "emotionStart": "overwhelmed",
  "emotionEnd": "steady",
  "actionStep": "Take a 15 minute break, then work only on the next three highest value tasks."
}
